# AIorDie
> Your AI employees. Your infrastructure. Your control. We deploy them. You own them.
> Deploy + Train + Advise.

## Company
- Name: AIorDie
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA

## What We Do
We deploy AI employees on client infrastructure, train client teams to run independently, and provide optional advisory support.
We do not operate as a managed service provider.

Core model:
1. Deploy, one-time build on client infrastructure
2. Train, handoff, runbooks, and team training included
3. Advise, optional monthly support for edge cases

## Pricing
### Deployment
- Starter: $5,000, 1 to 2 agents
- Growth: $10,000, 3 to 5 agents
- Scale: $15,000 to $20,000, 6 to 10 agents
- Enterprise: custom, 10+ agents

### Advisory
- Light: $1,500/mo, 4 hours
- Standard: $2,500/mo, 8 hours
- Priority: $4,000/mo, 16 hours

## Support Escalation
1. Ask your AI employees, free
2. Check your runbook, free
3. Call AIorDie advisory, paid

## Proof
- Tomek Group runs live on this stack
- The site itself is run by AIorDie operators and agents
- We sell deployment, not theory
